testCases.title: Verify navigation to the 'Scrape This Site' homepage
steps: Navigate to the Sandbox page
Click locator `page.locator('a.nav-link.hidden-sm.hidden-xs')`
Verification: Expect URL to change to '/'
End test case due to navigation

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the 'Lessons' page
steps: Navigate to the Sandbox page
Click locator `page.locator('a.nav-link').nth(0)`
Verification: Expect URL to contain '/pages/'
Click locator `page.locator('a.nav-link').nth(0)`
Verification: Expect URL to change to '/lessons/'
End test case due to navigation

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the 'FAQ' page
steps: Navigate to the Sandbox page
Click locator `page.locator('a.nav-link').nth(0)`
Verification: Expect URL to contain '/pages/'
Click locator `page.locator('a.nav-link').nth(0)`
Verification: Expect URL to change to '/faq/'
End test case due to navigation

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the 'Login' page
steps: Navigate to the Sandbox page
Click locator `page.locator('xpath=//a[contains(text(), "Login")]')`
Verification: Expect URL to change to '/login/'
End test case due to navigation

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the 'Countries of the World' page
steps: Navigate to the Sandbox page
Click locator `page.locator('xpath=//a[contains(text(), "Countries of the World: A Simple Example")]')`
Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/simple/'
End test case due to navigation
expected: Countries of the world page loads successfully

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the 'Hockey Teams' page
steps: Navigate to the Sandbox page
Click locator `page.locator('xpath=//a[contains(text(), "Hockey Teams: Forms, Searching and Pagination")]')`
Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/'
End test case due to navigation

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the 'Oscar Winning Films' page
steps: Navigate to the Sandbox page
Click locator `page.locator('xpath=//a[contains(text(), "Oscar Winning Films: AJAX and Javascript")]')`
Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/ajax-javascript/'
End test case due to navigation
expected: Oscar Winning Films page loads successfully

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the 'Turtles All the Way Down' page
steps: Navigate to the Sandbox page
Click locator `page.locator('xpath=//a[contains(text(), "Turtles All the Way Down: Frames & iFrames")]')`
Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/frames/'
End test case due to navigation
expected: Turtles All the Way Down page loads successfully

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the 'Advanced Topics' page
steps: Navigate to the Sandbox page
Click locator `page.locator('xpath=//*[@id="pages"]/section[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[5]/h3[1]/a[1]')`
Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/advanced/'
End test case due to navigation
